# Slumbr

> Slumbr is a dream journal app for iPhone and Android that records dreams by voice or
> text, analyses them with AI, and turns them into short AI-generated videos. New
> accounts get a free video on sign-up. Slogan: "Unlock your dreams."

Note: llms.txt is an emerging convention with little proven effect on AI retrieval as of
2026. The real citation levers are crawlable content, structured data, and third-party
authority. This file is low-cost insurance, not a primary lever.

## Key pages
- [We Turned Real Dreams Into AI Videos](https://slumbr.ai/blog/we-turned-real-dreams-into-ai-videos): real dream journal entries run through Slumbr's AI video pipeline, with results and takeaways.
- [Download on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/gb/app/slumbr-dream-journal-ai/id6744979739)
- [Get it on Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.slumbr.slumbr)

## Dream meaning guides
- [Flying dreams](https://slumbr.ai/dream-meanings/flying-dreams)
- [Water dreams](https://slumbr.ai/dream-meanings/water-dreams)
- [Being chased dreams](https://slumbr.ai/dream-meanings/being-chased)
- [Recurring dreams](https://slumbr.ai/dream-meanings/recurring-dreams)
